_comment: A2A AgentCard payload (PDF Section 1, Page 2) for the Host Orchestrator. After deploying host_agent to Reasoning Engine, replace REASONING_ENGINE_ID below.
name: Weather Host Orchestrator
description: Orchestrator agent that routes weather questions to the Weather Forecast Agent over A2A and returns the answer to the user.

skills.name: Weather Orchestration
skills.description: Accepts natural-language weather questions, fans out to the remote Weather Forecast Agent, and consolidates the response.
examples: What is the weather like in Chicago and Miami?
Compare the temperature in Seattle vs Denver today.
